sql_array: CREATE TABLE URL_example (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, url_column URL NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO URL_example (url_column) VALUES (cast('https://www.example.com' as url));
UPDATE URL_example SET url_column = convert('https://www.updated-url.com', url) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT url_column FROM URL_example WHERE url_column = url 'https://www.example.com';
DELETE FROM URL_example WHERE url_column = cast('https://www.delete-url.com' as url);
